entryServices.title: QA Consulting & Automation
entryServices.target: B2B SaaS, Fintech and Startups with production bugs
entryServices.pain: Is your manual QA not scaling with your release velocity? Are bugs reaching production before you can catch them?
entryServices.desc: We audit your quality process, design the automation framework and eliminate bugs before they reach your users.
features: QA audit and action plan in 5 days
Automation with Playwright / Cypress / Selenium
CI/CD integration for continuous quality
Coverage reports and quality KPIs

entryServices.title: AI Quality Shield
entryServices.target: Companies with complex UIs and frequent releases
entryServices.pain: Every release is a risk. Every bug visible to the customer costs money, time and reputation.
entryServices.desc: AI-powered QA: automated visual testing, regression detection and intelligent coverage of your product's most critical cases.
features: Visual AI testing and regression detection
Intelligent coverage of critical user journeys
Automatic pre-release impact analysis
Real-time product health dashboard

entryServices.title: Web & Mobile App Development
entryServices.target: Companies that need solid digital platforms
entryServices.pain: Your digital presence doesn't match your company's level. You need a platform that converts, scales and stays up.
entryServices.desc: We design and develop websites and mobile apps with clean architecture, optimized for performance and conversion from day one.
features: Strategic UX/UI design focused on conversion
Frontend and backend development with clean code
Native and hybrid iOS and Android apps
Deployment, CI/CD and post-launch support

enterpriseServices.title: Fractional CTO + Dev Team
enterpriseServices.target: US Startups without a senior technical team
enterpriseServices.value: The senior CTO you need, without the cost or risk of a full-time hire.
enterpriseServices.desc: Strategic technical leadership plus a turnkey development team. We define architecture, set standards, deliver code and scale your product alongside you.
features: Product architecture and complete technical roadmap
Developer team selection and leadership
Technology stack definition and code standards
PR reviews, quality gates and technical debt management
Direct communication with founders and investors

enterpriseServices.title: Edge AI Vision Sprint
enterpriseServices.value: Computer vision and AI in production in weeks, not months.
enterpriseServices.desc: We deploy Computer Vision and Edge AI solutions directly into your production line, logistics or industrial quality control, with measurable results from the first sprint.
features: Edge AI solution diagnosis and design in 1 week
Computer Vision development and integration
Deployment on edge hardware (Nvidia Jetson, etc.)
Real-time monitoring dashboard and alerts
Usage license + monthly technical support included
enterpriseServices.ctaLabel: Explore Edge AI for my industry
